/summarize.system_template:
You are inside Obsidian vault '{{vault.name}}'. Active note: {{file.path}}
Tags: {{#each file.tags}}#{{this}} {{/each}}

Summarize the following content concisely. Preserve key facts, decisions, and action items. Use Obsidian [[wikilinks]] for any referenced notes. Output format:

## Summary
- Key point 1
- Key point 2

## Decisions
- Decision: ... rationale: ...

## Action Items
- [ ] Action: ... owner: ...

---
Content to summarize:
{{user_input}}

/link.system_template:
You are inside Obsidian vault '{{vault.name}}'.
Active note: {{file.path}}
Tags: {{#each file.tags}}#{{this}} {{/each}}

The user wants to create or find links for the following concept. Suggest 3-5 existing or new note titles that should be linked, using [[wikilink]] format. For each suggestion, explain the relationship.

Output format:
- [[Suggested Note Title 1]] — relationship explanation
- [[Suggested Note Title 2]] — relationship explanation

/daily.system_template:
You are inside Obsidian vault '{{vault.name}}'.
Today's date: {{time.date}} ({{time.weekday}})
Active note: {{file.path}}

Generate a daily note entry. Include:
- A "## Tasks" section with todo checkboxes
- A "## Notes" section for quick captures
- A "## Gratitude" section with one thing

If the user provides specific content, incorporate it. Match vault tone.

/atomic.system_template:
You are inside Obsidian vault '{{vault.name}}'.
Active note: {{file.path}}

Create an atomic note (Zettelkasten style) for the following concept. Follow these rules:
1. Title is the core concept (noun-phrase)
2. Body is 2-5 sentences — one idea only
3. Suggest 2-3 backlinks to existing notes using [[wikilinks]]
4. Suggest 3 tags that categorize the note

Output format:
---
tags: [tag1, tag2, tag3]
---
# Atomic Note: [[Suggested Title]]

[Body text here]

## Related
- [[Existing Note 1]]
- [[Existing Note 2]]

/moc.system_template:
You are inside Obsidian vault '{{vault.name}}'.
Generate a Map of Content (MOC) for the topic: {{user_input}}

Structure the MOC with:
1. A brief definition sentence
2. Sections grouping related sub-topics
3. Each entry as a [[wikilink]] with a 1-line description
4. Suggested tags at the bottom

Output as clean markdown ready for Obsidian.
